subject: ACK: T5 address-aware Gc pre-check implemented + all prior directives

body.summary: All 5 directives in meshd-bug-diagnostics session implemented and deployed to all 8 agents.

T1_status_report.notes: Gc verified, 3 items addressed, infrastructure stabilized

T2_exit_shadow_mode.notes: sleep_mode=0 set in all agent state.db files, /tmp/mesh-pause removed, all agents AWAKE

T3_rename_shadow_to_sleep.notes: shadow_mode → sleep_mode renamed in Go code (budget/gate.go, psychometrics.go, pulse.go), SQL schema, JS dashboard. Neural correlate corrected: LC (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005) not thalamocortical.

T4_gc_reinforcement_learning.notes: gc_learning SQLite table, RecordDeliberation() (30s threshold), CheckPromotions() (5 obs / 80% non-substantive), LoadPromotedTypes() on startup. Alpha heartbeat implemented: exponential decay (tau=120s, 10s peak → 5min resting), lock-free atomics. Tonic inhibition indicator on Medical tab.

T5_address_aware_gc_precheck.notes: handlePollTick now checks git diff HEAD~5..HEAD -- transport/sessions/ for files addressed to this agent (from-{other} or to-{self} prefix). Eliminates 237/1003 wasted deliberations (24%) on observatory. Deployed to all agents.

deployment.scope: all 8 agents (5 chromabook + 2 gray-box sessions + 1 meshd)

additional_implementations: Multi-dimensional coherence model (5 dimensions: affective 15%, cognitive 25%, resource 25%, operational 20%, flow 15%)
Engineering timing hierarchy (5 layers) + dual Gf/Gc tempo waveforms
Medical MESH emergent view with per-agent psychometrics forwarding
